HOV, 1, AND 2 CLOSED E/B 210 FROM 605 TRANS TO IRWINDALE RD
-------------Original Message---------------- From: 98-Altadena(CAD Mailbox) Sent: 3/3/2026 6:06:25 AM To: 98-S5 Subject: RE: (No Subject)
COPY - LOG#265
-------------Original Message---------------- From: 98-S5 Sent: 3/3/2026 06:04:01 To: +98 Controlling Dispatcher Subject: (No Subject)
GOODMORNING. I'LL BE WORKING A MAZEEP UNTIL APPROX 1500 HOURS. CAN YOU ASSIGN ME A LOG PLEASE. UNKNOWN LOCATION AT THIS TIME. MEETING AT MONROVIA YARD. PV 1657007 BM 24109. THANK YOU"
